FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f8cfa13b880>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-30T00:38:18Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-30T00:36:38Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert test_username in usernames, (
            f"Test user {test_username!r} not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181416157 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181453817 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181468825 {

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181529758 new$version <- version
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181530270 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181539998 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181540438 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181549776 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181550668 if (!missing(bg))

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181572691 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181587719 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181588741 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181603157 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181604129 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181619347 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181620209 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181661616 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181678167 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181695060 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181715318 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181716170 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181733632 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181768928 "default"))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181812860 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181825822 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181837456 }
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181838398 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181853746 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181871519 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/04/30 00:39:57.181900533 }
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181936149 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181955746 }
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181956708 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181970023 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181970884 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181985171 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/30 00:39:57.181986002 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 00:39:57.182004667 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/30 00:39:57.182005429 }
2026/04/30 00:39:57.182018383 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/30 00:39:57.182019184 old$family <- family
2026/04/30 00:39:57.182044490 }

2026/04/30 00:39:57.182267510 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
